content.body:
New profiles: architect (Opus), code-reviewer, security-reviewer,
test-engineer, debugger (all Sonnet). Existing profiles enriched with
Methodology, Tool guidance, Failure modes, Constraints, and Output
expectations sections. Inspired by oh-my-claudecode agent structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add 5 specialist profiles + enrich existing 6
